summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PRD in 300 web app. Backend API fully functional with all validations working correctly. Frontend UI and integrations working excellently with proper form validation, Claude API integration, result display, and responsive design. Found one minor CSS styling issue with word count capitalization.

ui_bugs.issue: Word count shows 'WORDS: 178' instead of 'Words: 178' (all caps instead of sentence case)

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and all endpoints (6/6 tests)
Hero section display with title, subtitle, and CTA button
Form fields presence and proper labeling (5 fields)
Core User validation for multiple users
Success Metrics validation for missing numbers
Submit button loading state ('Cutting the fluff...')
Claude API integration and PRD compression
Result display with PRD content and metadata
Rejection case handling with proper error message
Footer message display ('Clarity is a skill.')

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor styling issue out of 17 features tested)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor CSS styling issue: Word count display should show 'Words: 178' instead of 'WORDS: 178'. Change CSS text-transform from uppercase to sentence case for .word-count class.
